speaker: speaker1
text: Only one . But I wanted to make sure I'd get it .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , I really wanted that Chanel bag , too . But just in case you should bid low .

speaker: speaker1
text: But there are only two more days until the bidding closes !

speaker: speaker2
text: I bid on a Chanel watch at the last minute , and got it sixty percent off !

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh ... I'm such a newbie . But at least I'm sure I'll get that tennis racket .

speaker: speaker2
text: Don't count on it , Babe . eBay is always full of surprises .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well ... guess how low the bidding starts on the tennis racket ?
